subcodes.first_line: I bear witness, O my God, my Master and my Mainstay, to the sanctification of Thine Essence above all likenesses and the exaltation of Thy Being beyond all similitudes [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اشهد یا الهی و سیدی و سندی بتقدیس ذاتک عن الامثال و تنزیه کینونتک عن الاشباه
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @absolute freedom; independence of God
